case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. ELIZABETH CONTRERAS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDERED ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 514 FOR COURT TRIAL. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. THE COURT RULES THAT PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER $2,560.99 FROM DEFENDANT ELIZABETH CONTRERAS. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A FORM OF JUDGMENT. REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON APR-07-2008 IN DEPT. 514. JUDGE THOMAS J. MELLON, JR., CLERK: V. MACK, REPORTER: MARIA LERTORA CSR 11935

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, ELIZABETH $1,834.87 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $208.12 INTEREST, $218.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,560.99, SEE SCANNED DOC
